title: How to Cleanse a Crystal Bracelet: Safe Methods (No Damage)
h1: How to Cleanse a Crystal Bracelet
primary_kw: how to cleanse a crystal bracelet
secondary_kw: how to clean a crystal bracelet
how to care for a gemstone bracelet
concept_focus: bracelet_material_specific（首饰材质专属：弹力绳/金属链/编织绳各不同；不重复H1完整四概念表，内链H1）

elastic_cord.name: Elastic Cord (Stretch Bracelet)
elastic_cord.characteristics: 弹力绳(橡胶/弹性线)——遇水/肥皂/热会老化松弛最终断裂
elastic_cord.care_note: 弹力绳手链是日常佩戴主力——月度selenite plate过夜是最佳care，洗澡/游泳/洗碗必摘
steps: 放selenite plate上过夜(6+hrs)，或满月夜窗台

metal_chain.name: Metal Chain (Silver / Copper / Brass)
metal_chain.characteristics: 金属链(银/铜/黄铜)——盐会加速氧化变黑， prolonged water也致氧化
metal_chain.care_note: 金属链手链忌盐——盐会加速银/铜氧化变黑；用专用银布定期擦亮，cleanse用no-contact法
steps: 金属部分用专用银布擦亮(独立于cleanse)

woven_thread.name: Woven Thread (Tibetan / Macramé)
woven_thread.characteristics: 编织绳(藏式/ macramé棉线蜡线)——吸水， prolonged water致变形/褪色/异味
woven_thread.care_note: 编织绳手链(站点Eastern-inspired特色)吸水忌泡——干法cleanse，wet时阴干勿暴晒
steps: 如绳wet(洗手溅到)立刻软布吸干，阴干勿暴晒/热风

stone_safety_for_bracelets.note: 除材质外，手链上的石头本身也要查耐受(影响能否用sun/water)

tier1_safe.label: 🟢 Tier 1 — Safe for ALL Bracelet Materials
tier1_safe.subtitle: 三种材质全适用(弹力绳/金属链/编织绳)

moonlight.name: Moonlight (Overnight on Windowsill)
moonlight.tradition: The full moon is the classic monthly reset — lay bracelets on a windowsill overnight, no contact, no chemistry.
moonlight.practical: Moonlight is reflected sunlight at roughly 1/400,000 the intensity — no risk to cord, metal, thread, or any stone.
steps: Lay bracelets flat on a windowsill at sunset
Leave overnight (8+ hours); full moon is ideal
Bring in before sunrise to avoid dew
moonlight.best_for_default: every bracelet material — elastic cord, metal chain, and woven thread all tolerate moonlight perfectly. The lowest-effort, lowest-risk monthly reset.

selenite.name: Selenite Plate (Passive Overnight)
selenite.tradition: Resting bracelets on a selenite plate overnight is a passive cleanse that works while you sleep — the plate does the work.
selenite.practical: No chemical interaction — harmless to cord, metal, thread, and every stone. Handle gently, as selenite itself is soft (Mohs 2).
steps: Place bracelets on a selenite plate, bowl, or bar
Avoid dragging metal clasps across the selenite surface
selenite.best_for_default: every bracelet material — the no-contact plate is the single best daily-care habit for a jewelry collection. Keep one plate by the bed and rest the day's bracelets on it each night.

sound.name: Sound (Singing Bowl / Bell)
sound.tradition: Sustained sound vibrations are believed to clear stagnant energy — fast, no-contact, works for several bracelets at once.
sound.practical: Sound waves are far too low-energy to affect cord, metal, thread, or any stone's structure — harmless.
steps: Play a singing bowl, bell, or tuning fork near the bracelets
Works for several bracelets at once
sound.best_for_default: every bracelet material — the fastest method, and a Tibetan singing bowl (which the shop carries) gives a grounding, ceremonial feel.

main_commercial.reason: The most common elastic-cord bracelet stone — daily wear means regular cleansing is practical care
main_commercial.compliance_phrase: A popular choice for those who like a grounding touchstone during a busy workday

semantic_match.reason: The classic bracelet stone — needs no-contact cleansing to protect color from sun fade
semantic_match.compliance_phrase: A rose quartz bracelet many people wear as a daily reminder to be gentle with themselves

entry_price.reason: Worn by day, rested on a selenite plate by night — a common two-role stone
entry_price.compliance_phrase: A stone many keep on their nightstand as part of a wind-down ritual before bed

niche.reason: Soft sheen suits Tibetan-style woven bracelets — a site specialty that needs dry-care methods
niche.compliance_phrase: A stone many choose for its soft iridescent sheen and connection to lunar ritual traditions

safety_warning.reason: The plate you rest bracelets on — self-cleansing and the mascot of jewelry care
safety_warning.compliance_phrase: A self-cleansing stone many use as a display plate to rest other pieces on — a practical care choice

jewelry_scene.reason: Sun-stable and warm — suits metal-chain bracelets that need dry, no-contact cleansing
jewelry_scene.compliance_phrase: Often associated with warmth and sunlight — a piece many enjoy as a bright accent in a collection

positions: M3-end-decision-card (主决策卡：查手链石头耐受)

> check its tolerance, then pick a safe no-contact method that protects both the stones and the cord.

insertion_points.M3-each-method: 每法都标三种材质适用性(弹力绳/金属链/编织绳)
insertion_points.M5-mistakes: 首饰材质典型错误(戴洗澡/盐泡金属/prolonged水泡编织绳)

eastern_touch.woven_thread: 藏式编织手链 / macramé (站点Eastern-inspired特色，干法cleanse)
eastern_touch.sound: Tibetan singing bowl / 颂钵 (站点实卖铜器，手链cleanse天然契合)
eastern_touch.moonlight: 满月冥想 / 月相周期 ritual (手链月度reset)

M1_quick_answer: 手链cleanse最安全法 = moonlight / selenite plate / sound（三种材质全适用）
手链忌用：water浸泡(绳老化)/salt(金属氧化)/smoke(残留)/earth/prolonged sun
进入方法前一句话'先认手链材质(弹力绳/金属链/编织绳)再选法'
M2_order_hardware: 第一段(材质分类前置): 手链材质决定方法——弹力绳/金属链/编织绳各不同
第二段(为什么手链需特殊care): 材质+石头双重耐受考量(绳子怕水盐，金属怕盐氧化)
第三段(内链H1): 手链是cleanse的子集——完整7法见H1
safety_first_narrative.compliance_phrasing: practical care / a daily reminder / protect both the stones and the cord

howto_6_steps.name: Identify your bracelet material
howto_6_steps.text: 确认手链材质(弹力绳/金属链/编织绳)——决定可用方法

howto_6_steps.name: Check the stones' tolerance
howto_6_steps.text: 查手链上石头的sun/water耐受(用cleansing-timer)——影响能否用sun/water

howto_6_steps.name: Remove the bracelet
howto_6_steps.text: cleanse前摘下手链——除moonlight/selenite/sound可戴净化外，其他法需摘

howto_6_steps.name: Choose a no-contact method
howto_6_steps.text: 从3安全法选(moonlight/selenite/sound)——三种材质全适用

howto_6_steps.name: Store & wear mindfully
howto_6_steps.text: 收纳干燥处；洗澡/游泳/洗碗必摘；月度selenite plate care

schema.howto_name: How to Cleanse a Crystal Bracelet Safely

compliance.gentle_note: Cleansing a crystal bracelet is practical jewelry care combined with personal ritual. There is no scientific evidence that bracelets store or release energy, but the care guidance — which materials tolerate water, salt, or sun — is real, and a regular no-contact cleanse keeps both the stones and the cord in good condition.
compliance.chemistry_case_sensitive: SiO₂（非sio₂）/ Ag₂S (银氧化) / Cu₂CO₃ — 校验用includes('sio₂')/'ag₂s'

three_perspectives.style: 融在段落里（H7科学权重高：材质care是真实物理/化学事实）
